project.name: suit-skills
project.description: A CLI tool for skills management.

nodes.name: .npmrc
nodes.summary: NPM registry configuration pointing to npmmirror.com mirror for faster package downloads in China.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Project manifest for suit-skills CLI tool with ES module support, defining build scripts, dependencies (commander, inquirer, react), and the CLI binary entry point.

nodes.name: dev-web.mjs
nodes.summary: Development script that spawns concurrent processes for the API server and Vite frontend, with graceful shutdown handling.

nodes.name: run
nodes.summary: Spawns a child process with the given name and arguments, handling exit and error events.

nodes.name: shutdown
nodes.summary: Gracefully terminates all spawned child processes on SIGINT/SIGTERM signals.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: CLI entry point that boots the application, handles errors with user-friendly messages, and exits with appropriate code.

nodes.name: context.ts
nodes.summary: Defines CliContext interface for dependency injection across CLI commands, with factory functions for default and custom contexts.

nodes.name: createDefaultCliContext
nodes.summary: Creates default CLI context using process.cwd() and OS homedir, with bound config and cache refresh operations.

nodes.name: createCliContext
nodes.summary: Creates CLI context with custom options for testing or scripting, supporting injected install target picker.

nodes.name: helpers.ts
nodes.summary: CLI helper functions for source lookup, validation, and skill metadata collection with tag filtering support.

nodes.name: collectMetasFromSources
nodes.summary: Refreshes cache and collects skill metadata from specified sources, deduplicating by skill name.

nodes.name: tagMatches
nodes.summary: Checks if a skill's tags match a given filter string using case-insensitive substring matching.

nodes.name: paths.ts
nodes.summary: Path utility converting display paths (~/ or ./) to absolute paths for install root resolution.

nodes.name: toAbsoluteInstallRoot
nodes.summary: Converts display paths (~/ or ./ prefixed) to absolute paths using cwd and user home directory.

nodes.name: program.ts
nodes.summary: Builds the Commander CLI program with all command registrations (list, search, info, install, update, remove, source, config, env, web).

nodes.name: buildProgram
nodes.summary: Constructs the Commander program instance with name, description, version, and all command registrations.

nodes.name: run.ts
nodes.summary: CLI execution functions for running the program with parsed arguments, with test-friendly variants.

nodes.name: runCliProcess
nodes.summary: Entry point that creates context, builds program, and parses process.argv.

nodes.name: runCliUserArgs
nodes.summary: Test helper that runs program with user-provided args array.

nodes.name: createProgramForTest
nodes.summary: Creates program instance with exitOverride for controlled test execution.

nodes.name: version.ts
nodes.summary: Reads package version by traversing up from current file to find package.json.

nodes.name: readPkgVersion
nodes.summary: Traverses directories upward to find and read version from package.json, falling back to 0.0.0.

nodes.name: config-cmd.ts
nodes.summary: Config command group with list, get, and set subcommands for viewing and editing configuration.

nodes.name: registerConfig
nodes.summary: Registers config command group with list, get, and set subcommands for configuration management.

nodes.name: env.ts
nodes.summary: Environment command group for managing install targets with list, set, and auto subcommands.

nodes.name: registerEnv
nodes.summary: Registers env command group for install target management with detection hints display.

nodes.name: info.ts
nodes.summary: Info command that displays skill details (name, version, description, author, tags, source).

nodes.name: findSkillAcrossSources
nodes.summary: Searches for a skill across specified sources or all enabled sources.

nodes.name: registerInfo
nodes.summary: Registers info command that displays skill metadata from cache.

nodes.name: install.ts
nodes.summary: Install command implementing global-to-central-store pattern with symlink creation for agent platforms.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses central store pattern: skills installed to ~/.agents/skills first, then symlinked to agent directories.

nodes.name: registerInstall
nodes.summary: Registers install command with alias (i, add), supporting global/project scope, agent targeting, and conflict strategies.

nodes.name: installed.ts
nodes.summary: Installed command listing skills across install targets with global/project scope options.

nodes.name: registerInstalled
nodes.summary: Registers installed command for listing installed skills across agent directories.

nodes.name: list.ts
nodes.summary: List command (alias ls) displaying skills with name, description, version, source, and tags in tabular format.

nodes.name: registerList
nodes.summary: Registers list command with query and tag filtering options, displaying detailed skill info.

nodes.name: remove.ts
nodes.summary: Remove command (alias rm) uninstalling skills from multiple install targets.

nodes.name: registerRemove
nodes.summary: Registers remove command for uninstalling skills across specified agent directories.

nodes.name: search.ts
nodes.summary: Search command finding skills by keyword from configured sources.

nodes.name: registerSearch
nodes.summary: Registers search command with keyword query and source filtering options.

nodes.name: source.ts
nodes.summary: Source command group managing remote skill sources with add, remove, list, enable, disable, default subcommands.

nodes.name: urlExists
nodes.summary: Checks if a URL already exists in configured sources.

nodes.name: registerSource
nodes.summary: Registers source command group with CRUD operations for remote skill repositories.

nodes.name: update.ts
nodes.summary: Update command refreshing installed skills from cache, comparing versions before updating.

nodes.name: readLocalVersion
nodes.summary: Reads version from local skill directory's meta.json.

nodes.name: updateSkillDir
nodes.summary: Updates a skill directory from cache if remote version is newer, handling version comparison.

nodes.name: registerUpdate
nodes.summary: Registers update command for refreshing installed skills from source cache.

nodes.name: web.ts
nodes.summary: Web command starting local Suit Skills console with browser auto-open option.

nodes.name: parsePort
nodes.summary: Validates and parses port number from command argument.

nodes.name: openBrowser
nodes.summary: Opens browser to specified URL using platform-specific command (cmd/open/xdg-open).

nodes.name: registerWeb
nodes.summary: Registers web command for starting local web console with host/port/source options.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Core type definitions for skill metadata, sources, configuration, install targets, and web API data structures.

nodes.name: fs.ts
nodes.summary: File system utilities for directory copying, symlink creation, and semantic version comparison.

nodes.name: copyDir
nodes.summary: Recursively copies a directory using Node.js cpSync.

nodes.name: createSymlink
nodes.summary: Creates directory symlink with junction type for Windows compatibility, handling existing paths.

nodes.name: parseVersion
nodes.summary: Parses semantic version string into major/minor/patch components, stripping pre-release tags.

nodes.name: gt
nodes.summary: Compares two version strings, returns true if first is greater.

nodes.name: eq
nodes.summary: Compares two version strings for equality.

nodes.name: output.ts
nodes.summary: Terminal output utilities for success, warning, and error messages with color support.

nodes.name: success
nodes.summary: Outputs success message with green checkmark prefix on TTY.

nodes.name: warn
nodes.summary: Outputs warning message with yellow warning sign prefix on TTY.

nodes.name: error
nodes.summary: Outputs error message with red X prefix on TTY, writes to stderr.

nodes.name: path.ts
nodes.summary: Path utilities for converting Git URLs to cache directory names and ensuring directory existence.

nodes.name: urlToCacheDirName
nodes.summary: Converts Git repository URL to cache directory name by stripping protocols and replacing special chars.

nodes.name: ensureDir
nodes.summary: Ensures directory exists, creating recursively if needed.

nodes.name: validate.ts
nodes.summary: Validation utilities for skill name format and skill identifier parsing with name@version support.

nodes.name: validateSkillName
nodes.summary: Validates skill name format: lowercase alphanumeric with hyphens, no leading/trailing hyphens.

nodes.name: parseSkillIdentifier
nodes.summary: Parses skill identifier into name and optional version (name@version format).

nodes.name: agents.ts
nodes.summary: Handles skill installation target path resolution and lists installed skills from a directory, supporting global/project scope and agent-specific directories.

nodes.name: resolveTargetPath
nodes.summary: Resolves the skill installation directory path based on config, global flag, and agent name, returning a path with trailing slash.

nodes.name: getInstalledSkills
nodes.summary: Scans a directory for installed skill folders and symbolic links, returning sorted skill names.

nodes.name: cache.ts
nodes.summary: Manages the cache directory for skill sources and handles git repository refresh operations (clone/pull) for updating cached skills.

nodes.name: refreshCache
nodes.summary: Refreshes the cache for a skill source by cloning or pulling the git repository, returning the cache path and status.

nodes.name: config.ts
nodes.summary: Core configuration management module handling sources, agents, default settings, config loading/saving, and migration of legacy configs.

nodes.name: getDefaultConfig
nodes.summary: Returns the default configuration with built-in sources, agent mappings, and default install targets.

nodes.name: loadConfig
nodes.summary: Loads configuration from file, normalizes sources, merges missing agents, and handles legacy migration.

nodes.name: restoreBuiltinSources
nodes.summary: Restores missing builtin sources to the configuration, ensuring all catalog sources are available.

nodes.name: git.ts
nodes.summary: Git operations module providing clone, pull, availability checks, and URL validation for skill source repositories.

nodes.name: cloneOrPullRepo
nodes.summary: Clones a repository if not present, otherwise pulls updates; returns path with status flags.

nodes.name: install-targets.ts
nodes.summary: Handles install target detection, parsing, and normalization with project/global environment hints.

nodes.name: getEffectiveInstallTargets
nodes.summary: Resolves effective install targets from agent flag, env CSV, or config with auto-detection.

nodes.name: install.ts
nodes.summary: Skill installation logic with conflict handling strategies: overwrite, skip, or rename for duplicate skills.

nodes.name: installSkillWithConflict
nodes.summary: Installs a skill from cache with conflict handling: overwrite, skip, or rename with sequential numbering.

nodes.name: prompt-install-targets.ts
nodes.summary: Interactive prompt module for selecting install targets when no targets are auto-detected, using inquirer checkbox UI.

nodes.name: resolveInstallTargetsOrPrompt
nodes.summary: Resolves install targets through interactive multi-select prompt when auto-detection returns empty.

nodes.name: skills.ts
nodes.summary: Skill metadata handling module for parsing SKILL.md frontmatter, meta.json, searching skills, and collecting skill metas from cache.

nodes.name: parseSkillFrontmatter
nodes.summary: Parses YAML-like frontmatter from SKILL.md markdown files into structured key-value pairs.

nodes.name: readSkillMarkdownMetadata
nodes.summary: Reads skill metadata from SKILL.md frontmatter or falls back to meta.json, returning unified metadata.

nodes.name: scanSkillsFromCache
nodes.summary: Scans cache root directory for skill directories, collecting metadata from root and skills/ subdirectory.

nodes.name: searchSkills
nodes.summary: Searches skill metadata by keyword, matching name, description, or tags with case-insensitive comparison.

nodes.name: api.ts
nodes.summary: Web API handlers for skill management web console: listing, searching, installing, removing, exporting skills and managing sources.

nodes.name: WebApiError
nodes.summary: Custom error class for Web API errors with code, message, HTTP status, and optional details.

nodes.name: listWebSkills
nodes.summary: Lists available skills from sources with optional filtering by source, keyword, and tag, including installed status.

nodes.name: installWebSkill
nodes.summary: Installs a skill from source to targets with conflict resolution; handles global installation via central store and symlink creation.
nodes.languageNotes: Global installation uses central store ~/.agents/skills with symlinks to agent directories for cross-platform compatibility.

nodes.name: removeWebInstalledSkill
nodes.summary: Removes an installed skill from a specified target and scope.

nodes.name: exportWebInstalledSkill
nodes.summary: Exports an installed skill as a ZIP file for download or sharing.

nodes.name: server.ts
nodes.summary: HTTP server for the skills web console with API routing and static file serving for the frontend assets.

nodes.name: handleApi
nodes.summary: Main API request handler routing all /api/* endpoints to appropriate handlers for skills, sources, and installed skills.

nodes.name: startWebServer
nodes.summary: Starts the HTTP server on specified host and port, returning server instance and URL.

nodes.name: zip.ts
nodes.summary: Pure JavaScript ZIP file creation module for exporting skill packages without external dependencies.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements ZIP format manually with CRC32 checksums and DOS datetime encoding for compatibility.

nodes.name: createZipFromDirectory
nodes.summary: Creates a ZIP archive from a directory, including all files with proper headers and CRC32 checksums.

layers.name: Entry Layer
layers.description: CLI entry points and bootstrap code that initializes the application and builds the command program

layers.name: API Layer
layers.description: CLI command handlers and web API endpoints that process user requests and manage skill operations

layers.name: Service Layer
layers.description: Core business logic for skill management including configuration, git operations, cache management, installation, and skill metadata handling

layers.name: Types Layer
layers.description: TypeScript type definitions for skill metadata, sources, configuration, and API data structures

layers.name: Utility Layer
layers.description: Shared utility functions for filesystem operations, terminal output, path resolution, validation, and development scripts

layers.name: Test Layer
layers.description: Unit and integration tests for CLI commands, library modules, utility functions, and web API endpoints using Vitest

layers.name: UI Layer
layers.description: Web frontend React application for the skills management console with views for library, installed skills, sources, and tags

layers.name: Configuration Layer
layers.description: Project configuration files for TypeScript, Vitest, Vite, NPM, skill metadata, and analysis tool settings

layers.name: Documentation Layer
layers.description: Project documentation including requirements, tasks, user manual, design specs, skill definitions, and spec-workflow templates

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: The project manifest defines suit-skills as a CLI tool for skills management, using Commander for command parsing, Inquirer for interactive prompts, and React for the web console. ES module support enables modern JavaScript imports throughout the codebase.

tour.title: CLI Entry Point
tour.description: The main entry point boots the CLI application, handling errors with user-friendly messages and exiting with appropriate codes. This file gives a bird's-eye view of how the application starts and what happens when something goes wrong.

tour.title: Core Type Definitions
tour.description: The type system defines the domain model: skill metadata, sources, configuration, install targets, and API data structures. These interfaces establish the vocabulary used throughout the codebase and form the contract between all layers.

tour.title: CLI Context and Bootstrap
tour.description: The CLI context module defines the dependency injection pattern used across all commands. Factory functions create contexts with bound config and cache operations, enabling testable command handlers with injected dependencies.

tour.title: Command Registration
tour.description: The program builder registers all CLI commands (list, search, info, install, update, remove, source, config, env, web) using Commander. This file shows the full command palette and how each command gets wired into the program.

tour.title: Configuration Management
tour.description: The config module handles sources, agents, default settings, and config loading/saving. It's the heart of the application's state management, storing which skill repositories to sync from and where skills should be installed.

tour.title: Skill Cache and Git Operations
tour.description: The cache module manages skill repositories as git clones in a local cache directory. Git operations handle clone/pull for keeping the cache synchronized with remote sources. This layer abstracts away the complexity of repository management.

tour.title: Skill Metadata Handling
tour.description: The skills module parses SKILL.md frontmatter and meta.json files, searches skills by keyword, and collects metadata from cache. This is where skill definitions become usable data for the CLI commands and web console.

tour.title: Installation Logic
tour.description: The install module implements the central store pattern: skills get installed globally first, then symlinked to agent-specific directories. The agents module resolves target paths for different environments. Conflict handling supports overwrite, skip, or rename strategies.

tour.title: CLI Command Handlers
tour.description: The command handlers process user requests: install adds skills, list shows available skills, search finds by keyword, info displays details, source manages repositories. These handlers demonstrate how the service layer gets exposed through the CLI.

tour.title: Web Console Backend
tour.description: The web server and API handlers provide HTTP endpoints for the skills console. API functions list skills, handle installation, manage sources, and export skill packages. The ZIP module creates downloadable skill archives without external dependencies.

tour.title: Web Console Frontend
tour.description: The React application provides the skills management console UI with four views: library for browsing skills, installed for managing local skills, sources for configuring repositories, and tags for filtering. The API client connects frontend to backend.

tour.title: Testing Infrastructure
tour.description: The test suite uses Vitest with comprehensive coverage: CLI commands, library modules, utility functions, and web API. Tests validate the full workflow from config loading through skill installation, ensuring reliability across all features.

tour.title: User Documentation
tour.description: The user manual provides complete CLI usage examples covering installation, configuration, all commands with code samples, and practical workflows. Requirements and tasks documents capture the design rationale and implementation roadmap.
